testcase.name: TC-001: Verify share.create happy path creates mountable NFS export
TC-003: Verify share.create blocks when path does not exist
TC-004: Verify duplicate export overwrites with warning
TC-005: Verify buildNfsOptions applies security mode correctly
TC-006: Verify RDMA option is appended when rdma=true
TC-007: Verify async_commit=true sets async instead of sync
TC-009: Verify share.create fails gracefully when daemon is down
TC-010: Verify /etc/exports is written atomically with fcntl lock
TC-011: Verify exportfs -r failure does not leave stale export file entry
TC-012: Verify multi-client export renders correctly in /etc/exports
TC-013: Verify idempotency - creating same export twice yields single entry
TC-014: Verify share.create with all four Kerberos security modes
TC-015: Verify path with spaces is handled correctly in exports file
TC-002: Verify plan mode returns preflight result without side effects
TC-008: Verify Zod rejects empty clients array
